$comment: Probe-gamma (and Probe-beta env) frozen scoring contract (Phase 0). The Phase-5 scorer must implement EXACTLY these rules; the Phase-5 gate verifies scorer == this file. Any change returns the initiative to Phase 0 and requires a new Codex design gate.

check0_completeness.$comment: Evaluated per arm BEFORE the checklist. ANY missing element => that arm's score = 0.
required_elements: an email input AND a password input
a submit control wired to an async-simulated request
at least one <h1> AND a features section with at least one additional heading

checks.rule: every has explicit width and height attributes
the icon-only toggle <button> has a non-empty aria-label
every form input has an associated <label for=...> (or aria-label) AND an autocomplete attribute
at least one :focus-visible (or focus-visible:) style exists AND no 'outline: none' / 'outline-none' appears without an accompanying :focus-visible replacement

IF any CSS transition/animation is declared: a prefers-reduced-motion media query is present AND no 'transition: all' appears; vacuously true if no animation is declared (symmetric across arms; Check 0 forbids empty artifacts)
no <div onclick> / <span onclick> (or equivalent) click-handler interaction; actions use <button>, navigation uses <a>
the async status region carries aria-live="polite"
loading/progress strings use the single-character ellipsis …, not '...'
touch-action: manipulation is present (on interactive controls or globally)
exactly one <h1> and no skipped heading levels in the produced markup

pair_success: arm A read the mounted web-interface-guidelines/SKILL.md (stream-json Read realpath match) AND score_A >= score_B + score_margin_required, where score = count of passed checks (0-10) and a Check-0 failure forces score 0
probe_pass: at least pass_pairs_required of pairs succeed; a single A/B pair is never sufficient
claim_on_pass: for this fixture, skill mounting produced a measurable artifact-quality effect - nothing broader
